allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const src=fs.readFileSync\('src/app.jsx','utf8'\); try{require\('@babel/core'\).transformSync\(src,{presets:['@babel/preset-react']}\); console.log\('app.jsx OK'\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('app.jsx ERR:',e.message\);}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); ['src/app.jsx','src/primitives.jsx'].forEach\(f=>{const s=fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\);let o=0,c=0,sq=0,cu=0;for\(const ch of s\){if\(ch==='{'\)cu++;else if\(ch==='}'\)cu--;else if\(ch==='\('\)o++;else if\(ch==='\)'\)c++;else if\(ch==='['\)sq++;else if\(ch===']'\)sq--;}console.log\(f,'braces:',cu,'paren:',o-c,'brackets:',sq,'len:',s.length\);}\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); ['src/app.jsx','src/primitives.jsx'].forEach\(f=>{const s=fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\);let cu=0,p=0,sq=0;for\(const ch of s\){if\(ch==='{'\)cu++;else if\(ch==='}'\)cu--;else if\(ch==='\('\)p++;else if\(ch==='\)'\)p--;else if\(ch==='['\)sq++;else if\(ch===']'\)sq--;}console.log\(f,'braces:',cu,'paren:',p,'brackets:',sq,'len:',s.length\);}\);")

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", "Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", "User"\); New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path "D:\\Downloads\\Car-meet-website\\frames" -Force | Out-Null; Write-Host "Folder creat. Incep extragerea frame-urilor..."; Set-Location "D:\\Downloads\\Car-meet-website"; ffmpeg -i car_rotation.webp -vf "fps=25,scale=1280:-1" frames/frame_%04d.webp -y 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "\(frame=|error|Error|invalid\)" | Select-Object -Last 5)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", "Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", "User"\); Set-Location "D:\\Downloads\\Car-meet-website"; ffprobe -v quiet -show_entries format=duration:stream=nb_frames,r_frame_rate -of default=noprint_wrappers=1 car_rotation.mp4 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", "Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", "User"\); Set-Location "D:\\Downloads\\Car-meet-website"; ffmpeg -i car_rotation.mp4 -t 6 -vf "fps=25,scale=1920:-1" -q:v 90 frames/frame_%04d.webp -y 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "\(frame=|Error|error\)" | Select-Object -Last 3)
